requirement_topic.en: Chile Electrical Installation and Grid Connection
requirement_topic.zh: 智利电气安装与电网接入
requirement_topic.zht: 智利電氣安裝與電網接入

summary.en: EV charger deployment in Chile is not only a product issue. Fixed installations are subject to Chile electrical-installation rules, SEC declaration or inspection routes where applicable, and distribution-company capacity or connection review for the site load. High-power DC chargers may require project-specific protection, metering, transformer, demand, and power-quality coordination.
summary.zh: 智利充电桩部署不仅是产品问题。固定安装需遵守智利电气安装规则，适用时完成SEC申报或检查路径，并接受配电公司对场站负荷的容量或接入审查。大功率直流充电机可能需要项目特定的保护、计量、变压器、需量和电能质量协调。
summary.zht: 智利充電樁部署不僅是產品問題。固定安裝需遵守智利電氣安裝規則，適用時完成SEC申報或檢查路徑，並接受配電公司對場站負荷的容量或接入審查。大功率直流充電機可能需要項目特定的保護、計量、變壓器、需量和電能品質協調。

standards_or_laws: Chile SEC electrical installation declaration and inspection routes
Chile low-voltage installation technical rules for EV charging infrastructure where applicable

summary.en: China charger documentation often includes GB/T 18487 design evidence and project grid-connection drawings. These do not replace Chile site load studies, local installer declarations, distribution-company review, or Chilean protection settings.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩资料常包括GB/T 18487设计证据和项目并网图纸。这些不能替代智利场站负荷研究、当地安装方申报、配电公司审查或智利保护定值。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁資料常包括GB/T 18487設計證據和項目併網圖紙。這些不能替代智利場站負荷研究、當地安裝方申報、配電公司審查或智利保護定值。

gap.en: Provide a Chile site pack: single-line diagram, load calculation, earthing, RCD or residual-current strategy, overcurrent and surge protection, short-circuit rating, transformer and metering interface, harmonic or power-quality data, emergency stop logic, and installer-ready Spanish documentation.
gap.zh: 应准备智利场站资料包：单线图、负荷计算、接地、RCD或剩余电流策略、过流与浪涌保护、短路额定值、变压器和计量接口、谐波或电能质量数据、急停逻辑，以及可供安装方使用的西班牙语文件。
gap.zht: 應準備智利場站資料包：單線圖、負荷計算、接地、RCD或剩餘電流策略、過流與浪湧保護、短路額定值、變壓器和計量接口、諧波或電能品質數據、急停邏輯，以及可供安裝方使用的西班牙語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for fixed electrical installation approval, declaration, inspection, and utility connection where those site routes apply; product certification alone does not approve the installation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese installation approval, grid-connection, and owner requirements

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Even if the charger hardware is accepted, the Chile site can fail at installation or distribution-connection review without local drawings, protection coordination, and installer documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即使充电桩硬件被接受，如果缺少当地图纸、保护配合和安装文件，智利场站仍可能无法通过安装或配电接入审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即使充電樁硬體被接受，如果缺少當地圖紙、保護配合和安裝文件，智利場站仍可能無法通過安裝或配電接入審查。
